Package com.hp.workpath.api

Provides classes for integrating with HP printer using HP Workpath SDK and contains all of the base classes.

See: Description

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    ILetObserver
    Interface ILetObserver is a generic interface to monitor the status of events changes associated with the job
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    Result
    Sets of result details of Workpath SDK API on various operations.
    Workpath
    This class includes all initialization API that uses HP Workpath SDK service.
    Workpath.actions
    Actions of Workpath SDK service
    Workpath.permissions
    Permissions of Workpath SDK service
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    Result.ErrorCode
    Enumeration of errors when operation is failed.
  • Exception Summary 
    Exception Description
    CapabilitiesExceededException
    Thrown when an application attempts to build or submit a job with unsupported attributes.
    SsdkUnsupportedException
    Thrown to indicate that a printer doesn't support SDK or a device has incompatible version of SDK.

Package com.hp.workpath.api Description

Provides classes for integrating with HP printer using HP Workpath SDK and contains all of the base classes.
